# hetzner-robot_server_product (Data Source)

Details and orderable options for a single Hetzner server product (`GET /order/server/product/{id}`). Unlike the `server_products` list, this exposes the orderable `dist` / `lang` / `arch` options so you can fill a `hetzner-robot_server_order` with valid values.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner-robot_server_product" "ax42" {
  id = "AX42-1"
}

output "install_options" {
  value = {
    dist = data.hetzner-robot_server_product.ax42.dist
    lang = data.hetzner-robot_server_product.ax42.lang
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Product ID (e.g. AX42-1).

### Read-Only

- `arch` (List of String) Orderable architectures
- `description` (List of String) Specification lines
- `dist` (List of String) Orderable distributions
- `lang` (List of String) Orderable languages
- `locations` (List of String) Available locations
- `name` (String) Product name
- `traffic` (String) Traffic allowance
